name: Foulborn The Coming Calamity
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Duration Gems
explicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Herald Gems
89% increased Energy Shield
35% chance to avoid being Stunned for each Herald Buff affecting you
mutatedMods: 100% increased Effect of Herald Buffs on you
flavourText: Whiff of cold, tiny spark, faintest flicker in the dark.
Embers swirl, ice takes form, sky exposed - Death's perfect storm.
Frost and thunder, flames shine bright, ruin walks the land tonight.
By your hand they dance and bend, wield them and brook no end.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, adding energy to the branded enemy. When the branded enemy reaches 20 energy, a large explosion occurs and the brand is removed. All energy is removed from the enemy when the brand is detached.

50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Activates every 0.1 seconds while Attached
Increases and Reductions to Cast Speed also apply to this Skill's Activation frequency
Can be Detached for a total Duration of 6.00 seconds
Deals 17% more Damage with Hits against Branded Enemy
